actions.intent: Commit to the lower-left urgent rescue instead of broad low-value clearing.
Open the central mixed-blocker pivot while preserving the lower rescue route.
Progress the top target only as part of a controlled pivot, not as a first-rescue distraction.
Finish the lower-left puppy before the water clock turns commitment into panic.
Use the mixed blocker clear to extract the top puppy and set up the final middle-right rescue.
Complete the middle-right rescue as the final sharp pivot of the late exam.

notes: Designer-approved late exam path: commit lower-left, pivot top, finish middle-right.
